## Summary

Describe the firmware, documentation, or test-data change.

## Review Area

- [ ] PID / filter behavior
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Flight-test data
- [ ] Scheduler / sensor-chain cleanup
- [ ] Safety notes

## Checks

- [ ] I reviewed `SAFETY.md`.
- [ ] I included logs or reproduction notes where useful.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
